# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy
  - notify

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY: recursive

before_script:
  - echo "Starting deployment process"

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building application"
    - echo "Build completed"
  only:
    - merge_requests

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production"
    - echo "Deployment completed"
  only:
    - main
  environment:
    name: production
    url: $PRODUCTION_URL
  tags:
    - $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE
    - $CI_COMMIT_TAG

notification_job:
  stage: notify
  script:
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        echo "MR Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
        echo "MR Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
        echo "Commit Message: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE"
      fi
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_COMMIT_TAG" ]; then
        echo "Creating tag: $CI_COMMIT_TAG"
      fi
  only:
    - main
  when: always

release_notes_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        echo "Generating release notes from MR: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
        echo "Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
      fi
  only:
    - main
  when: on_success

merge_request_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Processing merge request"
    - echo "MR Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "MR Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
  only:
    - merge_requests
  when: always
